SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls

Class TlsExtension

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.TlsExtension
public class TlsExtension extends Object
Container for a TLS extension type and its data. Used to capture all extensions from ServerHello for analysis and TLS server fingerprinting.
